+--------+    +---------+
|  Done  |    |  Retry  |
+--------+    +---------+
     ^             ^
     | success     | error
     +------+------+
            |
      +-----+-----+
      |  Process  |
      +-----------+
            ^
        validate
            |
       +----+----+
       |  Start  |
       +---------+
